summary: MoodDrop full-stack tested. Backend: 19/20 pytest cases passed (95%); the 1 fail is a test-fixture artifact (shared session retains login cookie so unauth /auth/me returns 200 - this is correct backend behavior). All critical APIs work: auth (register/login/me/logout JWT+cookie), idempotent /api/moods POST per day, locked /api/moods/feed until self post, history capped at 7 for free / 365 for pro, stats with range_30/90/365 + avg_intensity + volatility for pro, friends add/list with self-block & 404 on unknown, dev/toggle-pro flips pro flag, free-tier 403 enforcement on intensity>5 and text/audio, Stripe checkout returns session URL and creates payment_transactions record. Frontend: onboarding 4-slide flow with skip works; login with admin@mooddrop.app/admin123 succeeds and routes to /home; home shows mood card 'luminous Joy 4/5' with streak 1; navigation across Home/Friends/Drop/Stats/Me tabs works; Stats renders streak, drops, dominant Joy, by-weekday chart, distribution bars, Pro insights with avg intensity & volatility; Profile shows avatar, PRO badge, streak/friends counts, History/Settings rows, demo toggle and logout; Friends screen renders add-by-email input with seed hint chips. Demo creds chip visible on login.

minor.issue: Unauth test fails when session is shared because login set httpOnly cookies on session - not a backend bug, just observation

issues: Console deprecation warnings: 'props.pointerEvents' and 'shadow*' style props (RN web warnings, harmless)

react_native_issues.issue: style.resizeMode deprecation warnings in expo logs - should migrate to props.resizeMode

testid_naming_deviations.actual: (not on profile when user is already Pro - admin seeded as Pro hides this CTA)
add-friend-cta on home (drop CTA shown only when no mood today; admin had a mood)
not verified - mood-create not exercised because admin already had today's mood and idempotent block prevents re-post

action_items: Optional: align testIDs with the review-request naming (add-friend-submit, friend-email-input, dev-toggle-pro, go-paywall, cta-drop-mood, mood-submit) for stable test selectors. Current testIDs work but differ from spec.

Optional: have a way to clear today's admin mood for re-testing the mood-create → submit flow (or expose a dev endpoint). The /api/moods POST happy path was verified end-to-end with a fresh registered free user in pytest; the mood-create UI screen itself was not opened because admin had a same-day mood from previous smoke tests.
Optional: migrate deprecated RN web props (Image.resizeMode, props.pointerEvents, shadow* style).
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is ~660 lines - acceptable for a single-domain API but could be split (auth/moods/friends/payments) when it grows.
CORS uses allow_origins=['*'] WITH allow_credentials=True - browsers ignore cookies in this combo; explicit origins should be set in production.
Cookie samesite='none' + secure=True is correct for cross-domain; frontend uses Bearer header from AsyncStorage which works regardless.
MongoDB _id is correctly excluded from all responses via projection {"_id": 0}.
is_pro() correctly handles tz-naive datetimes from Mongo by adding UTC.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (flows tested: onboarding, login, home, friends nav, stats, profile)

seed_data_creation: pytest registered ephemeral users test_<uuid>@mooddrop.app and added Luna as friend; these can be cleaned later. Admin retains its seeded Joy 'luminous' mood from earlier smoke test.
context_for_next_testing_agent: To retest mood-create UI: clear admin mood with `mongosh test_database --eval "db.moods.deleteMany({})"` or use a fresh registered user via /auth/register. Frontend tab bar items don't expose data-testid; click by text 'Friends'/'Stats'/'Me'/'Drop'/'Home'. EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL is the public URL.
